_comment: Fully SYNTHETIC corpus (no public-domain source, no rename). Purpose-built to reproduce the 'Elara' incident for the outline-fidelity eval: a ~17k-char synopsis whose leads (Milo Voss, Zara Okafor, Edric Thane) first appear past char 4,000, and an in-world term 'the CEL' = Chief Executive Lich that reads like a company. synopsis.txt is the editable source; ground_truth.json is generated from it.
title: Bored to Undeath

canonical_beats.title: Milo Voss is retained and onboarded into Reconciliations
Zara Okafor trains Milo and begins recruiting him
The Chief Executive Lich is revealed as Edric Thane, once a clerk
Milo finds the ledger discrepancy funnelling tenure to the CEL
Zara proposes a work stoppage — a union of the dead
Milo resigns and reconciles Edric Thane's account, undoing the Lich
